name: Sebastian Solace - Soaked clothes
description:
Pov: You get to Sebastian's shop far too quickly. Sebastian just returned from a supply run a minute after you've entered, but his clothing is soaked from traveling back and forth underwater. Making them see-through. Ogling ensues to his chagrin. (Anypov) (Expendable!User)

This man is so fucking hot it's not even funny. Was inspired by a comic made by Ava.Dearest or @SpinkleCake00Z on twitter, her art in general is amazing.
creator: Renni_Sci
